content: agent1 here: implementing 'Remove Temperature Modulation; Add Deterministic Prompt Cache Salt' in dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. Will edit propose_instruction_for_predictor, generate_instruction_class, DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

Thanks - noted. My changes: (1) add cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, and GenerateSingleModuleInstruction (inside generate_instruction_class) signatures; (2) GenerateModuleInstruction.forward() gains cache_salt param, threaded into describe_program/describe_module/generate_module_instruction calls; (3) GroundedProposer: add new method _cache_salt(self, pred_i, demo_set_i); (4) propose_instruction_for_predictor: remove temperature/epsilon modulation code (lines ~417-435), compute cache_salt, pass to instruction_generator(...). I will NOT touch __init__ params or the tip-selection block in propose_instructions_for_program (lines ~360-371) - that's yours. Will merge carefully around propose_instruction_for_predictor's call signature (it currently takes program, predictor, pred_i, T, demo_candidates, demo_set_i, trial_logs, tip). Ping me before you edit that function's body so we don't clash.

agent1 done: cache_salt feature implemented in dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py, all local tests pass (tests/propose/), patch.txt written. If you edit this file after me, please re-run 'git diff' scoped review before writing your own patch.txt to avoid double-counting my hunks.
